name: Chocolate Pecan Pie Bars
recipeIngredient: 12 oz NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, beat flour, butter, and brown sugar until crumbly. Press into a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
3. Bake the crust for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. In a medium bowl with wire whisk, beat eggs, corn syrup, granulated sugar, melted butter, and vanilla extract. Stir in pecans and chocolate morsels.
5. Pour filling evenly over baked crust.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set. Cool, then cut into bars (2x1 1/2 inches). Makes about 3 dozen bars.
